pi_items.source: Path verified consistent across task.json:18, setup_task.ps1:27 (cleaned), and export_result.ps1:41 (checked). DreamPlan supports JPG export via File > Save Screenshot (F8), confirmed by NCH Software official documentation and by agent trajectories in second_floor_addition task which successfully exported .jpg files to Desktop.
Path verified consistent across task.json:19, setup_task.ps1:28 (cleaned), and export_result.ps1:42 (checked). JPG export confirmed working by live testing evidence and agent trajectory analysis.
Path verified consistent across task.json:20, setup_task.ps1:29 (cleaned), and export_result.ps1:43 (checked). JPG export confirmed working.

pi_items.verified_value: DreamPlan's native format is .DDP (not .DPN). However, DreamPlan's Save As dialog accepts any user-typed filename, so saving as .dpn will succeed.
pi_items.source: Web search on file-extensions.org, fileinfo.com, filext.com, and solvusoft.com all confirm DreamPlan uses .DDP as its native project file extension. .DPN is NOT a DreamPlan format. However, the second_floor_addition task (which also uses .dpn) scored 100/100 with Gemini agent — the agent successfully saved 'two_story_design.dpn' and it was accepted by DreamPlan. The Save As dialog allows arbitrary filenames. The export_result.ps1 checks for this exact path and it will work because DreamPlan saves whatever filename the user types.

Path verified in export_result.ps1:15 ($resultPath) which writes to this location, and setup_task.ps1:31 which cleans it. Live testing confirmed export_result.ps1 successfully wrote valid JSON to this path (evidence: hard_tasks_evidence_logs/dreamplan_home_design_software_env/sunroom_addition/08_export_result_json.txt).
Path verified in setup_task.ps1:43 (writes Unix timestamp) and export_result.ps1:14 (reads it). Live testing confirmed timestamp 1773989903 was written and correctly read back by export_result.ps1.

This is a metadata hint for the VLM checklist verifier, not enforced by the stub verifier. 10KB (10000 bytes) is a reasonable minimum for JPEG images with actual visual content. For reference, the second_floor_addition task uses 10000 for floor plans and 30000 for 3D views. Since this task's verifier is a stub, this value is advisory only.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task starts with Contemporary House loaded in DreamPlan
pi_items.verified_value: Contemporary House sample project is pre-loaded via post_start cache and Ensure-DreamPlanReadyForTask
pi_items.source: Live testing confirmed: screenshot 01_initial_state.png shows DreamPlan open with Contemporary House in 3D view. The setup_task.ps1 calls Ensure-DreamPlanReadyForTask (from task_utils.ps1) which verifies the Contemporary House is loaded and performs full recovery if not. The post_start hook (setup_dreamplan.ps1) opens the Contemporary House sample and saves a QEMU savevm checkpoint.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task requires exporting 3 views as JPG images via Save Screenshot
pi_items.verified_value: DreamPlan supports JPG and PNG export via File > Save Screenshot (F8 shortcut)
pi_items.source: NCH Software official documentation confirms: 'Export your project as JPG, PNG, OBJ, STL, 3D model, webviewer and more.' Agent trajectories from second_floor_addition confirm successful JPG export to Desktop paths. Web search on nchsoftware.com confirms Save Screenshot feature.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task requires drawing new walls to create a room addition
pi_items.verified_value: Wall tool exists under Building tab. Walls can be drawn in 2D blueprint view.
pi_items.source: Agent trajectory analysis: create_basement_story task (Kimi score 80) successfully used Building > Walls tool to draw wall segments. Agent trajectory for second_floor_addition (Gemini score 100) used Building > Rooms to create room outlines which auto-generate walls.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task requires placing a door on the shared wall
pi_items.verified_value: Door library exists under Building > Doors. Confirmed door types include: '1/2 Glass Entry', '3/4 Glass Entry', '3-Panel Contemporary Entry', 'Accordion Patio Doors', 'Arched Glass Entry', 'Composite Door', 'Corsica Door', 'Door Frame'.
pi_items.source: Agent trajectory analysis: install_interior_archway task navigated to Building > Doors panel and enumerated available door types. The Doors category is confirmed to exist with multiple door models. Note: archways/open passages are NOT in the library, but standard doors ARE confirmed present.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task requires placing windows on exterior walls
pi_items.verified_value: Window library exists under Building > Windows. 'Classic Window' (28 inches wide, 52 inches high) is confirmed available and placeable.
pi_items.source: Agent trajectory analysis: second_floor_addition task (Gemini score 100) successfully placed a Classic Window on a second-story exterior wall. The agent selected Building > Windows and placed the window without difficulty.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task requires applying wood flooring to sunroom floor
pi_items.verified_value: Wood flooring textures confirmed available: 'Hardwood - Dark', 'Hardwood - Light', 'Hardwood - Tiled', 'Inlayed Wood', 'Plywood'. Default floor is 'Plywood'.
pi_items.source: Agent trajectory analysis: change_flooring_material task (Kimi score 100) successfully changed flooring to 'Hardwood - Light' from the Floor Textures dialog. The agent navigated to the flooring tool and selected from the available wood options. Web search on nchsoftware.com confirms DreamPlan includes wood, tile, stone, and brick flooring textures (~50 total).

pi_items.metadata_value: Task requires placing a table in the sunroom
pi_items.verified_value: Table items confirmed in library: '6 Top Round Table', '6 Top Table' (under Interior > Furniture), 'Kitchen Table', 'Beach Coffee Table'.
pi_items.source: Agent trajectory analysis: design_outdoor_kitchen task (Kimi score 60) successfully found and placed '6 Top Round Table'. create_backyard_fire_pit task found tables via search. complete_home_staging found 'Beach Coffee Table' via search.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task requires placing at least 2 chairs
pi_items.verified_value: Chair/armchair items confirmed in library: 'Contemporary Armchair', 'Mid-Century Armchair', 'Modern Sectional Armchair', 'Semi-Circular Armchair' (under Interior > Furniture > Sofas and Couches).
pi_items.source: Agent trajectory analysis: complete_home_staging task listed all items in the Sofas and Couches category including multiple armchair types. design_outdoor_kitchen task searched for 'outdoor chair' and found results (though ran out of steps before placing them).

pi_items.metadata_value: export_result.ps1 produces JSON with per-file exists/size_bytes/mtime_unix/is_new fields
pi_items.verified_value: Confirmed. JSON output has keys: task, task_start, sunroom_floorplan_jpg, sunroom_exterior_jpg, sunroom_interior_jpg, sunroom_design_dpn, app_was_running. Each file object has: exists (bool), size_bytes (int), mtime_unix (int), is_new (bool).
pi_items.source: Live testing: export_result.ps1 ran successfully (exit code 0) and produced valid JSON. Evidence at hard_tasks_evidence_logs/dreamplan_home_design_software_env/sunroom_addition/08_export_result_json.txt shows the complete output with task_start=1773989903, all files correctly showing exists=false (no agent had run), and app_was_running=true.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses NCH DreamPlan Home Design Software (installed at C:\Program Files (x86)\NCH Software\DreamPlan\dreamplan.exe) with the built-in Contemporary House sample project pre-loaded via QEMU savevm checkpoint. The agent must create a sunroom addition on the rear of the house. All required DreamPlan features are confirmed available: wall/room drawing (Building tab), doors (Building > Doors: Composite Door, Corsica Door, etc.), windows (Building > Windows: Classic Window 28x52 inches), wood flooring (Floor Textures: Hardwood - Light, Hardwood - Dark), tables (Interior > Furniture: 6 Top Round Table, Kitchen Table), and chairs (Interior > Furniture > Sofas and Couches: Contemporary Armchair, Mid-Century Armchair). JPG export is via File > Save Screenshot (F8 shortcut). The project save extension .dpn is not DreamPlan's native .DDP format, but DreamPlan's Save As dialog accepts any user-typed filename so .dpn will work. The export_result.ps1 script correctly checks all 4 output files and writes a structured JSON result. The setup_task.ps1 correctly cleans stale files before recording the start timestamp, and calls Ensure-DreamPlanReadyForTask to verify the Contemporary House is loaded. All file paths are consistent across task.json, setup_task.ps1, and export_result.ps1.
